title: AxRewards
description: The Ultimate and Lightweight Daily / Weekly Reward Plugin
body:
![https://i.imgur.com/By7EfqU.png](https://i.imgur.com/By7EfqU.png)
[![https://i.imgur.com/oGUVRlq.png](https://i.imgur.com/oGUVRlq.png)](https://dc.artillex-studios.com/)[![https://i.imgur.com/Nfd3YBp.png](https://i.imgur.com/Nfd3YBp.png)](https://docs.artillex-studios.com/axrewards.html)
![https://i.imgur.com/zuzq7LQ.png](https://i.imgur.com/zuzq7LQ.png)

### Disclosure:
- The plugin downloads some external libraries on first startup which are required for it to function.
- Some non-sensitive data is collected by BStats and AxMetrics for statistical purposes. [Further information.](https://docs.artillex-studios.com/metrics-system.html)


![https://i.imgur.com/MkIv8y7.png](https://i.imgur.com/MkIv8y7.png)
- /axrewards - Open reward gui [Perm: axrewards.open ] (given by default)
- /axrewards reload - Reload plugin - [ Perm: axrewards.reload ]
- /axrewards reset - Reset cooldown of player [ Perm: axrewards.reset ]
- /axrewards forceopen <player>    - Open the gui for a player [ Perm: axrewards.forceopen ]

Source Code: [](https://github.com/artillex-studios/axrankmenu) [https://github.com/Artillex-Studios/AxRewards](https://github.com/Artillex-Studios/AxRewards)

<details>
<summary>Text Transcript</summary>


AxRewards
A lightweight daily / weekly reward plugin

WHAT IS AXREWARDS?
AxRewards is a highly customizable and lightweight reward plugin. You can define rewards with any length of cooldown that you would like.

FEATURES

Simple Configuration
it only takes a few minutes to set up.

Multi Server Support
No redis needed!

Database Support
H2, SQLite, MySQL, PostgreSQL

AUTO UPDATING GUI
The GUI refreshes every second without having to reopen it.

LOCK REWARDS BEHIND PERMISSIONS
Create rewards that only people with certain ranks or permissioons can access.

COOLDOWN SYSTEM
Claiming cooldown can be defined in seconds.

CUSTOMIZABLE GUIS
You can modify all the items and it is possible to add decorations to the guis.

PLACEHOLDERS
The plugin supports PlaceholderAPI.

COLOR FORMATS
The plugin supports all popular color formats (minimessage, legacy, etc)

</details>


**If you need Commissions, Support, or anything else**
